commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a diagnostic.* transcript-entry predicate to the sync gateway last-message preview reader, expands focused session-utils tests, and adds a changelog fix entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main accepts an assistant-shaped diagnostic tail row because the preview readers only check message.role. The async sessions.list path can propagate that value into lastMessagePreview when includeLastMessage is requested, but I did not run a live gateway session in this read-only sweep.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and a branch refresh to cover the async preview path; do not queue repair while the external proof gate is missing.

commands.review_summary:
Updates three browser docs pages to qualify `browser wait --load networkidle` support as managed-profile-only and existing-session-unsupported.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main reproduces the docs contradiction by reading the unqualified `networkidle` example beside the existing-session limitation, and source inspection confirms the runtime split.
commands.review_followup: Do not queue an automated repair because this external PR is missing required after-fix real behavior proof; the contributor should revise the qualifier and add proof before maintainer handling.
